threats.title: Ubuntu snap-confine Flaw Could Give Local Users Root on Default Desktop Installs
threats.summary: Cybersecurity researchers have disclosed details of a new local privilege escalation (LPE) vulnerability in snap-confine that an unprivileged user can trigger to obtain root access and gain complete control of a target environment. threats.title: Adobe Acrobat Extension Flaw Let Malicious Sites Read WhatsApp Web Data
threats.summary: Cybersecurity researchers have disclosed details of a now-patched vulnerability chain in the Adobe Acrobat Chrome extension that has over 314 million users, which, if exploited, could facilitate a silent hijack of a user's WhatsApp data. threats.title: Hackers Exploit Windmill Flaw to Read Arbitrary Server Files Without Authentication
threats.summary: A high-severity security flaw impacting open-source developer platform Windmill has come under active exploitation in the wild, per VulnCheck. The vulnerability in question is CVE-2026-29059 (CVSS score: 7.5), a case of unauthenticated path traversal impacting Windmill's "get_log_file" endpoint ("/api/w/{workspace}/jobs_u/get_log_file/{filename}").
